_comment: Localized headlines + subtitles for App Store screenshot frames. 7 locales × 8 frames. Headlines use \n for line break. Military proper nouns (MGRS, UTM, DAGR, NATO, SALUTE, MEDEVAC, SPOT, CFF, NVG, Meshtastic, FixPhrase, GPX, KML) stay in English. Length-tested against the 107px headline / 47px subtitle layout — JA/KO renders ~30% narrower, DE compounds ~10% wider.
